raw.message: Every day you get a free spin on FanCash Spins. Open the app, spin the wheel, and see what rewards show up.

hook.summary: A smartphone displays a losing slot spin while a voiceover highlights a $100,000 daily prize pool.
hook.visual_action: Static shot of a phone on a desk; the digital slot machine reels spin and stop on a 'Better Luck Next Time' result.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Play FanCash Spins for free every day for a chance at $100,000 in daily rewards.

scene_flow: Static top-down view of a smartphone resting on a wooden desk next to a notebook.
The FanCash Spins app interface is active, showing a slot machine animation.
The reels stop on a losing combination, prompting the user to try again.
audience_proxy: Adult sports fans and casual gamblers aged 21+ looking for low-stakes daily rewards.
